overview.description: The 2x Avalanche ETF (AVAZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in long avax, short usd currency. The fund is actively managed, aiming to provide 2x the daily price movements of Avalanche (AVAX). The funds primary investment is cash-settled futures contracts AVAZ was launched on May 15, 2026 and is issued by Volatility Shares.
